title: Vitalvet team offer excellence, compassion
bodyText:
[{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Vitalvet Animal Medical Centre, a veterinary healthcare and retail group, takes pride in providing the best care for your loved companions.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Vitalvet Animal Medical Centre, a veterinary healthcare and retail group, takes pride in providing the best care for your loved companions."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The veterinary practices use the latest veterinary technology, knowledge and nursing to help sick pets recover. The group boasts a well-equipped veterinary clinic located in Church Street within the heart of Mossel Bay, as well as an online and in-person store, and complete, fully equipped veterinary practice in George."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vitalvet's Mossel Bay branch has a fully equipped theatre, kennels and laboratory support. A range of veterinary services are available, including general health check-ups, sterilisations, vaccinations, sick pet consultations and more.","html":"Vitalvet's Mossel Bay branch has a fully equipped theatre, kennels and laboratory support. A range of veterinary services are available, including general health check-ups, sterilisations, vaccinations, sick pet consultations and more."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"An excellent, professional veterinary team assists you and your pets, led by veterinarian Dr Johann Rauch.","html":"An excellent, professional veterinary team assists you and your pets, led by veterinarian Dr Johann Rauch."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"It is truly fulfilling to be able to bring my absolute best to my precious patients that I have been dedicated to for so long,\" says fellow veterinarian, Dr Helen Pringle, who has been a practising veterinarian since 1996.","html":"\"It is truly fulfilling to be able to bring my absolute best to my precious patients that I have been dedicated to for so long,\" says fellow veterinarian, Dr Helen Pringle, who has been a practising veterinarian since 1996."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The veterinarians are passionate and caring. Dr Kayleigh-Jean Legge has been nurturing her passion since the age of three, when she would \"bandage\" her fluffy toys, using toilet paper, and leave out food for stray cats that would pass her window.","html":"The veterinarians are passionate and caring. Dr Kayleigh-Jean Legge has been nurturing her passion since the age of three, when she would \"bandage\" her fluffy toys, using toilet paper, and leave out food for stray cats that would pass her window."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Besides handling pet patients, the team enjoys interacting with pet owners. \"I love the interaction between humans and animals, and it still excites me, to this day, to work in this field,\" says veterinary nurse, Ilse Wyatt-Goodall.","html":"Besides handling pet patients, the team enjoys interacting with pet owners. \"I love the interaction between humans and animals, and it still excites me, to this day, to work in this field,\" says veterinary nurse, Ilse Wyatt-Goodall."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Vitalvet strongly believes in keeping pets healthy and happy, thereby doing the same for their owners. \"We aim to offer the best veterinary care possible in a professional and caring manner. We are always happy to answer any questions, and we strive to lead each day by asking, “how can we help?”","html":"Vitalvet strongly believes in keeping pets healthy and happy, thereby doing the same for their owners. \"We aim to offer the best veterinary care possible in a professional and caring manner. We are always happy to answer any questions, and we strive to lead each day by asking, “how can we help?”"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Cnr of Church & Spring Streets, Mossel Bay","html":"Cnr of Church & Spring Streets, Mossel Bay"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"044 690 6000[email protected]","html":"044 690 6000
[email protected]"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
